nodes.context: Marseille gang specializing in burglaries, hold-ups, and racketeering, active in the 1950s-1960s.
French organized crime milieu, a network of gangsters in Marseille.
Marseille crime clan led by Antoine Guérini, involved in the Milieu.
Russian organized crime group involved in a cigarette smuggling operation in Marseille.

edges.context: The Bande des Trois Canards was part of the broader Milieu network in Marseille.
The Milieu wanted revenge for the killing of Robert Blémant by the Guérini clan.
The Russian Mafia collaborated with Milieu figures like Richard Erman in a cigarette smuggling operation.
